title: Me to You Tatty Teddy Plush 15cm-High Graduation Bear On Luxury Gift Plinth - Official Collection, Grey
features: CUTE GRADUATION PLUSH BEAR - soft and fluffy, this adorable Tatty Teddy is designed especially for a student celebrating graduating; it's the perfect gift for a much-loved friend, daughter, son, granddaughter, brother, sister, niece, or anyone celebrating their graduation from college or university
SOFT FABRIC AND ADORABLE GRADUATION CAP - Tatty Teddy's grey fur is super soft and fluffy; the black graduation cap adds a cute academic touch

15-CM HIGH BEAR ON LUXURY GIFT PLINTH - this gorgeous cuddly bear is the star of the show on a premium cardboard stage-effect plinth illustrated with flowers, graduation caps and a luxury foiled Graduation caption
HAND FINISHED FOR PREMIUM QUALITY - every Tatty Teddy plush bear is made with love, care and meticulous attention to detail to be treasured for a lifetime

GENUINE TATTY TEDDY by ME TO YOU – unique and instantly recognisable with grey fur, a cute blue nose and patches, Tatty Teddy has captured millions of hearts all over the world with a timeless message of love, happiness and friendship
description: Product Description Celebrate graduation with this adorable plush Tatty Teddy designed especially to mark academic achievement. Cute Tatty Teddy is wonderfully fluffy and comes on a pretty gift plinth illustrated with meadow flowers, graduation caps and a luxury foiled Graduation caption. Tatty Teddy is wearing a black graduation cap and sits 15cm high - the perfect size for cuddles every day of the year! Made with love, care and meticulous attention to detail, all Me to You plush bears are hand finished for premium quality to be treasured forever. Safety Warning Keep away from fire
